name.description: The name of the virtual machine.

vm_size.description: The size of the virtual machine.

network_interface_ids.description: A list of IDs of the network interfaces to associate with the virtual machine.

availability_set_id.description: The ID of the availability set to associate with the virtual machine.

enabled.description: Should Boot Diagnostics be enabled for this Virtual Machine?

storage_uri.description: The Storage Account's Blob Endpoint which should hold the virtual machine's diagnostic files.

delete_os_disk_on_termination.description: Should the OS Disk be deleted when the Virtual Machine is deleted?

delete_data_disks_on_termination.description: Should the Data Disks be deleted when the Virtual Machine is deleted?

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource.

id.description: Specifies the ID of the Custom Image, Either provide Id or any other image reference.

publisher.description: Specifies the publisher of the image used to create the virtual machine.

offer.description: Specifies the offer of the image used to create the virtual machine.

sku.description: Specifies the SKU of the image used to create the virtual machine.

image_version.description: Specifies the version of the image used to create the virtual machine.

storage_data_disk.type: list(object({name: string, create_option:string, caching: string, disk_size_gb: number, lun: number}))
storage_data_disk.description: Specifies the storage data disks to attach to the virtual machine.

disable_password_authentication.description: Specifies whether password authentication should be disabled. If set to false, an admin_password must be specified.

ssh_keys.description: Source the Key Data from a local file using file() function.

provision_vm_agent.description: Should the Azure Virtual Machine Guest Agent be installed on this Virtual Machine?

enable_automatic_upgrades.description: Are automatic updates enabled on this Virtual Machine?

timezone.description: Specifies the timezone of the Virtual Machine.

certificate_url.description: The ID of the Key Vault Secret which contains the encrypted Certificate which should be installed on the Virtual Machine. This certificate must also be specified in the vault_certificates block within the os_profile_secrets block

pass.description: Specifies the name of the pass that the content applies to

component.description: Specifies the name of the component to configure with the added content.

setting_name.description: Specifies the name of the setting to which the content applies.

content.description: Specifies the base-64 encoded XML formatted content that is added to the unattend.xml file for the specified path and component.

computer_name.description: Specifies the name of the Virtual Machine.

admin_username.description: Specifies the name of the local administrator account.

admin_password.description: The password associated with the local administrator account.

type.description: Specifies the type of Managed Service Identity that should be configured on this Virtual Machine.

identity_ids.description: Specifies a list of User Assigned Managed Identity IDs to be assigned to this Virtual Machine. Required when 'type' is set to 'UserAssigned' or 'Both'.

storage_os_disk.type: list(object({name: string, create_option: string, caching: string, disk_size_gb: number, image_uri: string, os_type: string, write_accelerator_enabled: bool}))

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
